name: Wand of Crackling Lightning (8th-Rank Spell)
description:
This wand is made of two copper plates and a ceramic center.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast at 8th-rank, but the spell's area is twice as wide (two adjacent and parallel 120-foot lines) and creatures that fail their save are for 1 round.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of lightning bolt at 8th-rank.
